name: World Cup Golf Center
about: World Cup Golf Center is a premium grass tee driving range facility in Hudson, NH, open year-round with heated winterized tee boxes. It features a dedicated Trackman Range with 19 heated hitting bays equipped with state-of-the-art radar launch monitors, offering ball and club tracking for detailed practice sessions. The center also provides online lesson booking with an experienced director of instruction and a pro shop for club fittings. Food and beverage service is available at the on-site cafe during winter months.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium heated grass tees open year-round
19 bays with top-tier Trackman technology for detailed ball and club data
Experienced golf instruction available with online booking

food_and_drink.notes: Cafe serves burgers, hot dogs, and other food items

simulator_hardware.notes: 19 heated bays with state-of-the-art Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The on-site cafe serves burgers, hot dogs, and beer.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes on a simulator is not specified, but it typically depends on the simulator software and player speed.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, World Cup Golf Center is suitable for families and youth, with a welcoming atmosphere and amenities for all ages.
